guidance.statement: Management guided to roughly 20% revenue growth in FY27.
Targeting an EBITDA margin of about 25% in FY27.
FY27 capex planned at Rs 650-700 crore for cGMP-4 and de-bottlenecking.

themes.evidence: CDMO order visibility described as the strongest in company history.
Spot R32 prices corrected on Chinese oversupply, expected to lap by H2 FY27.
cGMP-4 to reach full utilisation over 18-24 months.

concall.tone_shift_vs_last_quarter: More confident on CDMO order visibility, more guarded on refrigerants and agrochem timing.

thesis_triggers.evidence: FY27 capex of Rs 650-700 cr announced on the call.
Management said nothing to announce on M&A.
Net debt peaks this year; deleveraging expected from FY28.

classification.justification: New cGMP blocks ramping lift blended margins as utilisation climbs.

management_tone.anchor: Called order visibility the strongest in the company's history and confirmed the schedule.
Framed the R32 correction as a headwind they expect to lap by H2 FY27.
